name: Hitech & Development Wireless Sweden Holding AB (publ)
summary: Hitech & Development Wireless Sweden Holding AB (publ) supplies technology and services within Internet of Things (IoT) and real-time positioning in Sweden. The company develops and supplies solutions for digitalization and optimization of industry physical processes by griffin enterprise positioning (GEPS) service built in artificial intelligence. It offers enterprise real time location services in the industrial IoT market; and GEPS, a solution that bridges the information gap between physical assets and business systems for asset management, fleet management, production logistics, staff safety, hospitality, and healthcare applications. The company also provides connectivity modules, such as dual band and mode Wi-Fi and Bluetooth modules, and Wi-Fi systems used in the automotive infotainment, wearables, healthcare, industrial, smart buildings, and connected homes for IoT and industrial and digital media markets. In addition, it offers RF-antenna and matching, FCC/CE certification, production test reference design, and long-term conservation services of electronic components, as well as RF module development services. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Kista, Sweden.
